channel.title: github_trending
channel.description: Latest posts from https://github.com/trending. follow.is: None

item.title: NousResearch /hermes-agent | Python | N/A
item.description: The agent that grows with you

item.title: google-labs-code /design.md | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: A format specification for describing a visual identity to coding agents. DESIGN.md gives agents a persistent, structured understanding of a design system.

item.title: stablyai /orca | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Orca is the ADE for working with a fleet of parallel agents. Run any coding agent with your own subscription. Available on desktop and mobile.

item.title: andreknieriem /headunit-revived | Kotlin | N/A
item.description: Headunit App for displaying Android Auto

item.title: flutter /flutter | Dart | N/A
item.description: Flutter makes it easy and fast to build beautiful apps for mobile and beyond

item.title: revfactory /harness | HTML | N/A
item.description: A meta-skill that designs domain-specific agent teams, defines specialized agents, and generates the skills they use.

item.title: JCodesMore /ai-website-cloner-template | TypeScript | N/A
item.description: Clone any website with one command using AI coding agents

item.title: interviewstreet /hiring-agent | Python | N/A
item.description: AI agent to evaluate and score resumes.

item.title: apple /container | Swift | N/A
item.description: A tool for creating and running Linux containers using lightweight virtual machines on a Mac. It is written in Swift, and optimized for Apple silicon.

item.title: ZhuLinsen /daily_stock_analysis | Python | N/A
item.description: LLM 驱动的多市场股票智能分析系统：多源行情、实时新闻、决策看板与自动推送，支持零成本定时运行。 LLM-powered multi-market stock analysis system with multi-source market data, real-time news, decision dashboard, automated notifications, and cost-free scheduled runs.

item.title: calesthio /OpenMontage | Python | N/A
item.description: World's first open-source, agentic video production system. 12 pipelines, 52 tools, 500+ agent skills. Turn your AI coding assistant into a full video production studio.
